A two‐step inverse Monte Carlo radiation method based on DRS under two source‐detector separations was proposed to quantify the skin structure, including chromophore concentration (melanin <jats:italic>f</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>m</jats:sub> and hemoglobin <jats:italic>f</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>b</jats:sub>), epidermal thickness <jats:italic>t</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>epi</jats:sub>, average vessel diameter <jats:italic>D</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>ves</jats:sub>, depth <jats:italic>d</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>pws</jats:sub> and thickness <jats:italic>t</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>pws</jats:sub> of the vascular layer for diseased skin. The method fitted the simulated DRS to the measured DRS iteratively, differences between which were described by a specific objective function to amplify blood absorption at 500–600 nm, and <jats:italic>D</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>ves</jats:sub>, <jats:italic>d</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>pws</jats:sub>, and <jats:italic>t</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>pws</jats:sub> were estimated based on <jats:italic>f</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>m</jats:sub>, <jats:italic>f</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>b</jats:sub>, and <jats:italic>t</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>pws</jats:sub> fitted in the first step. The results showed that the two‐step method dramatically improve the inversion accuracy with mean errors of <jats:italic>f</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>m</jats:sub>, <jats:italic>f</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>b</jats:sub>, <jats:italic>t</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>pws</jats:sub>, and <jats:italic>d</jats:italic>
<jats:sub>pws</jats:sub> less than 5%.</jats:p>","DOI":"10.1002/jbio.202400118","type":"journal-article","created":{"date-parts":[[2024,9,24]],"date-time":"2024-09-24T12:58:52Z","timestamp":1727182732000},"update-policy":"https://doi.org/10.1002/crossmark_policy","source":"Crossref","is-referenced-by-count":0,"title":["Noninvasive Detection of the Skin Structure and Inversed Retrieval of Chromophore Information Based on Diffuse Reflectance Spectroscopy"],"prefix":"10.1002","volume":"17","author":[{"given":"Jinyao","family":"Wang","sequence":"first","affiliation":[{"name":"State Key Laboratory of Multiphase Flow in Power Engineering Xi'an Jiaotong University  Xi'an China"}],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]},{"given":"Dong","family":"Li","sequence":"additional","affiliation":[{"name":"State Key Laboratory of Multiphase Flow in Power Engineering Xi'an Jiaotong University  Xi'an China"}],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]},{"ORCID":"https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6821-2008","authenticated-orcid":false,"given":"Bin","family":"Chen","sequence":"additional","affiliation":[{"name":"State Key Laboratory of Multiphase Flow in Power Engineering Xi'an Jiaotong University  Xi'an China"}],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]}],"member":"311","published-online":{"date-parts":[[2024,9,24]]},"reference":[{"key":"e_1_2_10_2_1","doi-asserted-by":"publisher","DOI":"10.1046/j.1524‐4725.1999.99100.x"},{"key":"e_1_2_10_3_1","doi-asserted-by":"publisher","DOI":"10.1126/science.6836297"},{"key":"e_1_2_10_4_1","doi-asserted-by":"publisher","DOI":"10.1111/jdv.15599"},{"key":"e_1_2_10_5_1","doi-asserted-by":"publisher","DOI":"10.1088/0031‐9155/42/1/002"},{"key":"e_1_2_10_6_1","doi-asserted-by":"publisher","DOI":"10.1016/j.ijheatmasstransfer.2017.07.033"},{"key":"e_1_2_10_7_1","doi-asserted-by":"publisher","DOI":"10.1007/s101030200013"},{"volume-title":"Cutaneous and Cosmetic Laser Surgery","year":"2006","author":"Goldman M.
